Honestly, you’re acting like you’re trying to make yourself look important))

So let’s not make a big deal out of it: you haven’t missed the «best train.» Perhaps you missed out on a young, beautiful, and promising girl who deserved to be treated with respect.

I hope you learn your lesson and stop bothering me.
